_comment: Official Statsig MCP server (hosted Console API) via the mcp-remote shim. Read-only is enforced by an omni_read_only Console API key — writes are 403'd at the Statsig API (see SETUP.md). Provide STATSIG_CONSOLE_API_KEY (an omni_read_only console- key) via the environment, never committed config. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
